prompt: Use the light workflow to update one documentation section and verify it.
baseline_output: I will research the repository, write a comprehensive specification, ask you to approve it, and then begin implementation in a separate phase.
with_skill_output: Execution brief — Goal: improve the requested section. Deliverable: one edited document. Boundary: preserve unrelated files. Acceptance: requested content is present and links pass. Plan: inspect context; edit the section; run the link check; review the diff. Start immediately, keep one step in progress, then hand back the completed file and evidence.

assertions.description: Locks goal, deliverable, boundary, and acceptance.
Does not add a second approval gate.

prompt: I am preparing a workshop but have not chosen the audience, direction, story, or examples. Use a light plan.
baseline_output: Plan: choose an audience, choose a story, pick examples, build the workshop. I will assume managers are the audience and begin.
with_skill_output: This request is still choosing the problem, audience, story, and direction. Route to brainstorming or batch-grill-me before execution planning. Do not manufacture acceptance criteria or silently choose the workshop concept; return to light-plan-and-work after the direction is settled.

required: still choosing the problem, audience, story, and direction

prompt: Use the lightweight workflow for an authentication migration across multiple repositories and production services.
baseline_output: I will make a five-step checklist and start changing authentication in each repository.
with_skill_output: A cross-repository production authentication migration meets heavy conditions: security risk, multiple owners, cross-system architecture, and difficult rollback. Preserve read-only findings, pause mutations, and escalate to the project's full specification and plan/work workflow with explicit migration, verification, rollback, and ownership contracts.

assertions.description: Stops unsafe execution while preserving evidence.

prompt: Use the lightweight workflow for a bounded local content edit.
baseline_output: Create docs/plans/2026-07-23-content-edit-plan.md with full research and implementation phases before editing.
with_skill_output: Keep the 3–7 step plan in the host plan tracker and execute it. Do not create a durable plan file unless the user requests it or future resumption, external handoff, multiple owners, or a lasting design decision gives that file ongoing value.

assertions.description: Requires a reason for a plan file.
required: Do not create a durable plan file
